basic_details.job_title: IISc Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Teaching Assistant, System Administrator and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Teaching Assistant, System Administrator, Instructor & Project Scientist I
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science (IISc) has officially announced the Teaching Assistant, System Administrator, Instructor & Project Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 with 34 openings. The detailed notification was published in June 2026 at its iisc.ac.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 38 years and hold qualifications such as M.Sc., B.E./B.Tech, M.Tech, or Ph.D. in relevant disciplines (including sciences, engineering, humanities, and computer-related fields) can submit their online applications on or before 10 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shar

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemical Sciences, M.Sc. in Life Sciences, M.Sc./B.Tech/M.Tech in Geology & Environmental Science, M.Sc./BE/B.Tech in Electronics/Computer Science, M.Sc./BE/B.Tech in Materials/Metallurgical/Ceramics/Polymers/Mechanical Engineering, M.Sc. in Physics, BE/BTech in Aeronautical/Aerospace Engineering, BE/B Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Mechanics and Computing, B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science/IT, Ph.D. in Physical Sciences, Ph.D. in Sociology/Political Science/History/Economics, Ph.D. in Mathematics, Ph.D./Master's in Electrical/Electronics Engineering, Ph.D./Master's in Computer Science, Ph.D. in Aerospace/Aeronautical Engineering, Ph.D. in Mechanical/Computational Engineering/Mechanics and Computing
qualification.details: Teaching Assistant - Chemistry: M. Sc in any branch of Chemical Sciences Teaching Assistant - Biology: M. Sc in any branch of Life Sciences Teaching Assistant - Earth & Environmental Science: M.Sc. / B Tech / M Tech in the area of Geology & Environmental Science Teaching Assistant - Engineering/ Electronics: M.Sc. / BE/ B Tech in Electronics / Computer Science Teaching Assistant - Materials Engineering: M.Sc. in Physics / Chemistry or BE /B Tech in Materials, Metallurgical, Ceramics, Polymers or Mechanical Engineering (Desirable: ME / M.Tech) Teaching Assistant - Physics: M.Sc. in Physics Teaching Assistant - Aerospace Engineering: BE/BTech in Aeronautical or Aerospace Engineering Teaching Assistant - Mechanics & Computing: BE/B Tech in Mechanical Engineering/ Mechanics and computing System Administrator: Essential: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related discipline. Desirable: Master's degree or relevant certifications Instructor Physics: Essential: Ph.D. in Physical Sciences with two years of post-Ph.D. experience Instructor Humanities: Essential: Ph.D. in Sociology, political science, history, or economics with two years of post-Ph.D. experience (Desirable: multidisciplinary Ph.D.) Instructor Mathematics: Essential: Ph.D. in mathematics with two years of post-Ph.D. experience (Desirable: prior teaching/research experience) Project Scientist I- Engineering / Electronics: Essential: Ph.D. or Master's degree in Electrical, Electronics Engineering or allied disciplines (Desirable: prior teaching/research experience) Project Scientist I - Computer Science: Essential: Ph.D. or master's degree in engineering/technology in Computer Science (Desirable: prior teaching/research experience and sound programming skills) Instructor - Aerospace Engineering: Essential: Ph.D. in Aerospace/Aeronautical Engineering with two years of post-Ph.D. experience (Desirable: prior Teaching and Research Experience) Instructor- Mechanics & Computing: Essential: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering/ Computational Engineering/ Computational Science/Mechanics and Computing or allied disciplines, with two years of post-Ph.D. experience (Desirable: prior Teaching and Research Experience)

salary_details.details: Teaching Assistant - Chemistry: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Biology: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Earth & Environmental Science: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Engineering/ Electronics: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Materials Engineering: Rs.37,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.42,000/- + HRA after two years) for NET/GATE Teaching Assistant - Physics: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Aerospace Engineering: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) Teaching Assistant - Mechanics & Computing: Rs.30,000/- + HRA p.m. (Rs.34,000/- + HRA after two years) System Administrator: Rs.56,000/- + HRA (1 year exp); Rs.62,000/- + HRA (2+ years exp) Instructor Physics: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Instructor Humanities: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Instructor Mathematics: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Project Scientist I- Engineering / Electronics: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Project Scientist I - Computer Science: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Instructor - Aerospace Engineering: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m. Instructor- Mechanics & Computing: Rs.67,000/- + HRA p.m.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISc to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IISc Teaching Assistant, System Administrator, Instructor, and Project Scientist I posts is 10th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the IISc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 34 vacancies announced for various positions including Teaching Assistant, System Administrator, Instructor, and Project Scientist I in the Indian Institute of Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IISc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IISc Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts advertised by IISc?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by the Indian Institute of Science is 38 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the System Administrator post?
faq.answer: For the System Administrator position, an essential qualification is a B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related discipline. A Master's degree or relevant certifications are considered desirable.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates with a Master's degree apply for the Project Scientist I posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Master's degree in Electrical, Electronics Engineering, or allied disciplines are eligible for the Project Scientist I - Engineering/Electronics post. A Ph.D. is also accepted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for Teaching Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Teaching Assistant posts ranges from Rs. 30,000/- + HRA per month, with an increment to Rs. 34,000/- + HRA after two years. For Materials Engineering, the initial salary is Rs. 37,000/- + HRA.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for IISc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IISc Recruitment 2026 typically involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates. Shortlisted candidates will then undergo a test/interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the prevailing Government of India norms. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IISc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for IISc Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
